procedure_steps.description: The student detaches the lens of the DSLR camera.
The student attaches the lens of the DSLR camera.
The student detaches the cover of the DSLR camera.
The student attaches the cover of their DSLR camera.
The student turns on the DSLR camera.
The student turns off the DSLR camera.
The student removes the battery from the DSLR camera.
The student inserts a battery into the DSLR camera.
The student removes the SD card from the DSLR camera.
The student inserts an SD card into their DSLR camera.

events.correction_type: Wrong Action, corrected by instructor verbally
events.description: The student removes a piece that is not the one they are told.
The student tries to turn the lens but cannot.

events.correction_type: Wrong Action, corrected by instructor verbally
events.description: The student presses the wrong button.

The student turns off the DSLR camera.

The student inserts a battery into the DSLR camera.

events.correction_type: Wrong Action, corrected by instructor verbally
events.description: The student opens the wrong lid.
